name: n8n-nodes-synology-suite
description: n8n community nodes for Synology DSM (API, Drive, Sheets, Office, MailPlus, Calendar, Note, Photos, Contacts, FileStation, Chat, Security, DownloadStation2) - AI Agent compatible
author: Maxime Olivier

scripts.copy:assets: cp nodes/SynologyDrive/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyDrive/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyDrive/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyDrive/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologySheets/*.png dist/nodes/SynologySheets/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologySheets/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologySheets/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyMailPlus/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyMailPlus/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyMailPlus/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyMailPlus/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyMailPlusTrigger/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyMailPlusTrigger/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyMailPlusTrigger/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyMailPlusTrigger/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyOffice/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyOffice/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyOffice/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyOffice/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyApi/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyApi/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyApi/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyApi/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyCalendar/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyCalendar/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyCalendar/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyCalendar/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyNote/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyNote/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyNote/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyNote/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyPhotos/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyPhotos/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyPhotos/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyPhotos/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyContacts/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyContacts/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyContacts/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyContacts/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyFileStation/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyFileStation/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyFileStation/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyFileStation/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyChat/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyChat/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyChat/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyChat/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologySecurityObservability/*.png dist/nodes/SynologySecurityObservability/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologySecurityObservability/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologySecurityObservability/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyDownloadStation2/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyDownloadStation2/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyDownloadStation2/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyDownloadStation2/ 2>/dev/null; true
